Notes: ECAC Upstate Championship semifinals - No. 4 Fisher upsets No. 1 Rensselaer
Fisher will play the winner of the UR-William Smith game at 1 p.m. on Sunday
in the championship game @ the UR Palestra
Game.Officials: Sharon Kowalski,  Joe DeSain,  Keith Miller
